meta.cql: space = PROPCL AND contributor = mkarolczak AND lastModified >= now(-730d)

results.title: Panel-cause fires — signature language tells (adjuster field notes)

storage.value:
Signature tells

Three FNOL phrases reliably signal panel-cause across the last two years of files:

  • 'popping sound before the smoke'
  • 'lights flickered before we saw fire'
  • fire location described as electrical service entrance or main breaker panel area

Confirmation path

  1. Order origin report immediately
  2. Cross-reference model against active recall list on receipt
  3. Preserve panel physically — chain of custody required for subro

Do not skip preservation

Even on small files. Even without 4A. The recall subrogation path is available regardless of endorsement.

results.title: ROR-before-letter phone call — script and objections

storage.value:
Script: 'This is a big claim, our engineer has to look at the panel, and while he does we're keeping our options open, but I have zero reason to think anything is wrong.'

Common objections and responses documented below.

results.title: Endorsement 4A — reference and dwelling extension mechanics

storage.value: Endorsement 4A extends dwelling coverage to include additional structures under specific circumstances. See §4.2 for triggering conditions.
Set reserve to the median outcome for the pattern you're seeing. Mark review Day 10 and Day 30. Do not over-reserve to feel safe — ALE decisions get slow.
